# Framework Commands

## Analyze Framework
Analyze repository and identify missing enterprise framework components.

## Generate Framework
Generate scalable pytest API automation framework structure.

## Optimize Framework
Review framework for scalability, modularity, and duplication issues.

## Generate Logging
Generate centralized request/response logging.

## Generate Retry Logic
Add flaky-test retry mechanism.

## Generate Config Layer
Generate environment-driven config management.

## Generate Reporting
Add Allure and HTML reporting integration.

## Generate CI/CD
Generate GitHub Actions pipeline for test automation.
